2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds tests to the server41tests suite for the COPY_NOTIFY operation in NFSv4.2 inter-server copy. The tests exercise the source-server half of the protocol, simulating a client requesting an inter-server copy and sending a COPY_NOTIFY message to the source server. Three test cases are included: CPNOTIFY1 issues a basic COPY_NOTIFY, CPNOTIFY2 uses a bad source stateid, and CPNOTIFY3 omits the current filehandle. The tests verify that the source server responds correctly in each case, returning an error if the operation is unsupported or invalid.
